rulings.Case Title: IN RE: FUMINORI "YUMI" ISHIBASHI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issue is waiver of notice (as Mr. Galster is deceased, but he appears to have survived Mr. Ishibashi, his heirs would take his share) and whether this court has sufficient evidence of the death (declaration based on statements made by another, not personal knowledge). No hearing notes will be sent.
